explanation: The user instructs to take an object out of the microwave and place it on the countertop. From the state, tomato_1 is identified as being inside the microwave. The robot is currently holding a knife (knife_0), which is not relevant to the task. The plan begins by navigating to the microwave, opening it, picking up tomato_1, moving to the countertop, and placing it there. The object tomato_1 is new in the sense that it is not on the countertop, so it is referred to as tomato_1 (not tomato_0). The action sequence follows valid subgoals: navigation, opening, picking up, and placing. The holding status is updated appropriately after pick-up and before placement.
